step1.title: Welcome to CalculEat! 🎉
step1.description: Your personal nutrition and calorie tracker
step1.intro: CalculEat helps you easily keep track of your calories, macronutrients and reach your health goals.
step1.feature1Description: BMR, TDEE and calorie goals based on your profile
step1.feature2Description: Quick shortcuts and recent foods for smooth logging

step2.title: Complete your profile
step2.description: To calculate your calorie needs we need some information
step2.intro: We need the following information to give you accurate calculations:
step2.item2Description: How active are you in your daily life?

step3.title: Start logging food
step3.description: Log your meals to reach your goals
step3.intro: After completing your profile you can start logging food:
step3.card1Description: Go to "Today" to log your meals and see daily progress
step3.card2Description: Use "Recent foods" to quickly add common foods
step3.card3Description: See your history and statistics under "History"
